anti_claim: Batch 10 Cold Eval Honesty imports and runs the real idea_microcosm cold_eval.py route-quality simulator over public fixtures, then audits the scorecard shape and claim ceiling. It is not a live agent benchmark, not navigation truth, not public release approval, and not proof that idea-first routing wins outside this deterministic fixture.
title: Batch 10 Cold Eval Honesty Capsule
